case_title: BELFOR, WILLIAM vs. BLAND, CARTHAN et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELFOR, WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT BLAND, CARTHAN

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BELFOR, WILLIAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BLAND, CARTHAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 875 FULTON ST #3, LEASE FORFEITED, CLERK'S NOTATION RENDERED ON ORIGINAL LEASE PER CRC 522
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BLAND, CARTHAN
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELFOR, WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT BLAND, CARTHAN DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELFOR, WILLIAM
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELFOR, WILLIAM SERVED MAR-01-1995, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BLAND, CARTHAN

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT BLAND, CARTHAN
